headline: ECB's Wunsch: Wage developments are benign; another move is possible but significant tightening is not currently required.
Fed's Waller: Labor risks have stabilized while inflation has accelerated; the 2% commitment is credible and forward guidance can help but becomes a hindrance when too rigid.
ECB's Schnabel: The shock cannot simply be looked through; supply-chain pressures remain elevated despite lower oil prices.
